scripts.lint: bun run --cwd frontend lint && bun run --cwd backend lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --cwd frontend lint:fix && bun run --cwd backend lint:fix
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd frontend typecheck && bun run --cwd backend typecheck
scripts.format:firmware: cd firmware && find . -type f \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.cc' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.hh' \) -print0 | xargs -0 clang-format -i
